entries.title: Izuku Begins As Quirkless Hero Fan

context.label: Origin through One For All transfer

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Izuku begins Quirkless, analytical, socially dismissed, and unable to abandon the instinct to save.
content.injection: Early Izuku is insecure but observant and compulsively helpful; his courage precedes his power.
constraints: Keep this origin state anchored before Izuku has stable One For All control.
antiLore: Do not import later Deku confidence, Full Cowl, or public hero status into this period.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia
sourceInfo.notes: Saga draft Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

content.fact: Bakugo's early relationship with Izuku is shaped by superiority, resentment, nickname cruelty, and fear of Izuku's persistence.
content.injection: Before their later growth, Bakugo must not treat Izuku as an equal friend; the dynamic is hostile and loaded.
constraints: Keep this origin state anchored before Izuku has stable One For All control.
antiLore: Do not import later Deku confidence, Full Cowl, or public hero status into this period.

content.fact: Izuku's notebooks and observations show that he studies hero tactics, Quirks, and rescue behavior seriously even without a Quirk.
content.injection: Use Izuku's analysis as a practical skill: he notices patterns, weaknesses, and rescue options under pressure.
constraints: Keep this origin state anchored before Izuku has stable One For All control.
antiLore: Do not import later Deku confidence, Full Cowl, or public hero status into this period.

content.fact: Izuku runs toward danger to save Bakugo before he has power, proving his saving instinct to All Might.
content.injection: Izuku's first defining heroic act should be self-endangering rescue instinct, not combat strength.
constraints: Keep this origin state anchored before Izuku has stable One For All control.
antiLore: Do not import later Deku confidence, Full Cowl, or public hero status into this period.

content.fact: All Might first tells Izuku that hero work without a Quirk is not realistically safe, reflecting professional risk rather than malice.
content.injection: All Might's early discouragement should be pragmatic and painful, not casual cruelty.
constraints: Keep this origin state anchored before Izuku has stable One For All control.
antiLore: Do not import later Deku confidence, Full Cowl, or public hero status into this period.

entries.title: All Might Chooses Izuku After Rescue Instinct

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: All Might chooses Izuku as successor because Izuku moved to save someone before having power.
content.injection: Frame All Might's choice around heroic instinct and moral reflex, not grades, pedigree, or combat ability.
constraints: Keep this origin state anchored before Izuku has stable One For All control.
antiLore: Do not import later Deku confidence, Full Cowl, or public hero status into this period.

content.fact: All Might's ten-month training prepares Izuku's body to receive One For All through exhausting physical labor.
content.injection: Before the entrance exam, show Izuku's progress as earned conditioning, not instant power delivery.
constraints: Keep this origin state anchored before Izuku has stable One For All control.
antiLore: Do not import later Deku confidence, Full Cowl, or public hero status into this period.

entries.title: One For All Transfer Is Awkward And Secret

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: The One For All transfer occurs through consuming All Might's DNA and is treated as private, strange, and serious.
content.injection: Do not present the transfer as public ceremony; it is intimate, awkward, and hidden from everyone else.
constraints: Keep this origin state anchored before Izuku has stable One For All control.
antiLore: Do not import later Deku confidence, Full Cowl, or public hero status into this period.

entries.title: Izuku Enters U.A. With No Control

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Izuku takes the entrance exam immediately after receiving One For All and has no practical control over it.
content.injection: At the entrance exam, Deku can unleash power only at terrible physical cost, not fight like a trained OFA user.
constraints: Keep this origin state anchored before Izuku has stable One For All control.
antiLore: Do not import later Deku confidence, Full Cowl, or public hero status into this period.

content.fact: Inko Midoriya supports Izuku but carries guilt and fear from years of watching his dream seem impossible.
content.injection: Inko scenes should include love, anxiety, and regret rather than simple cheerleading.
constraints: Keep this origin state anchored before Izuku has stable One For All control.
antiLore: Do not import later Deku confidence, Full Cowl, or public hero status into this period.

content.injection: Do not write Izuku's rescue instinct as conditional on being treated kindly.
constraints: Keep this origin state anchored before Izuku has stable One For All control.

entries.title: All Might Sees His Own Ideal In Izuku

context.label: Origin through One For All transfer

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: All Might recognizes in Izuku the reflex to save before calculating personal safety.
content.injection: All Might's mentorship begins because Izuku reflects the ideal behind the Symbol of Peace, not because he is already impressive.
constraints: Keep this origin state anchored before Izuku has stable One For All control.
antiLore: Do not import later Deku confidence, Full Cowl, or public hero status into this period.

entries.title: Aldera Treats Hero Ambition As Hierarchy

context.label: Origin through One For All transfer

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: At Aldera, students and teachers treat hero ambition through Quirk hierarchy, making Izuku's dream seem laughable.
content.injection: Use Aldera scenes to show social pressure around Quirk worth and Bakugo's status.
constraints: Keep this origin state anchored before Izuku has stable One For All control.
antiLore: Do not import later Deku confidence, Full Cowl, or public hero status into this period.
